accurate.why: All claims match the resolution and accurately describe Home Rule Act review mechanics.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the review-period context is correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states it disapproves the DC Revised Criminal Code Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains it blocks the DC act from taking effect under the Home Rule Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states House, Senate, and approval dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval blocking the act.

concise.why: Somewhat padded with repeated explanation of the review mechanism.

correct_entities.why: DC Council, Home Rule Act, D.C. Act 24-789 all correct.

correct_figures.why: Dates and act numbers are correct.
